channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Tuesday, April 28, 2026
item.description: Today's most consequential stories sit at the intersection of your two worlds — marketing and consulting. The CMO Council's new AI-and-human-essence research is a direct briefing note for your consulting pitch: it gives you data to argue that AI augments but cannot replace strate...
